title: Essential Mod Buttons
description: This makes all Minecraft menu buttons match the Essential Mod.
body:
![A modified Minecraft menu in the style of the Essential Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6wHEFnAv/images/ba98d89ec2b9f31e6ffad39cba206d5ffb70e198.png)
This resource pack changes all menu buttons to match the menus from the Essential Mod, which are darker and simpler than the default ones.
This resource pack does not require the Essential Mod, but it does replicate the look of it.
Get the Essential Mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
